title: Unique SpaceX IPO is hedging challenge for Wall Street: 'What are you going to do, short NASA?'
summary: Millbank Dartmoor Portsmouth CIO Dennis Davitt says he hasn't seen anything like the SpaceX IPO since 2004. Investors are nervous about their positions.

title: Sen. Warren calls on SEC to delay SpaceX IPO, flagging concerns about valuation and governance
summary: Sen. Elizabeth Warren noted Elon Musk's "uniquely unchecked" power as SpaceX's majority shareholder and other concerns in a letter to the SEC.

title: SpaceX primed for double-digit pop on first day, if 'perps' trading is any guide
summary: Crypto traders are currently pricing the SpaceX pre-IPO perpetual future on Hyperliquid at $162, about 20% above the company's fixed IPO share price of $135.

title: Here’s that ‘SpaceX’s IPO is overvalued by 114%’ research in full

summary: How much must you pay not to play?

title: How SpaceX’s IPO ambitions ride on Starship’s path to Mars
summary: Musk’s largest rocket must prove it can routinely fly before the company can deliver on its biggest promises
